creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Baptiste Daroussin from comment #10)
> I'm lost here, where are we, is there still something needed?

Yes, this is still open.

It can be closed when there are no more ports that set (and have to
set) one of CFLAGS+=-I${LOCALBASE}/include or LDFLAGS+=-L${LOCALBASE}/lib.

PR 130677 is related and focuses on CPPFLAGS.
